questions.question: Describe the basic idea behind Horspool’s Algorithm for string matching and explain how it handles repeated characters in the pattern.
Write a pseudo-code implementation of Horspool’s Algorithm and explain the significance of the 'shift' operation in the algorithm.
Compare and contrast Horspool’s Algorithm with other popular string matching algorithms (e.g. Rabin-Karp, Boyer-Moore) in terms of their efficiency and time complexity.
